parsed.production_notes: The video uses an AI-generated avatar for the top panel in the first scene, evident from the slightly unnatural lip-sync and stiff posture. The rest of the video features human actors in a split-screen format, concluding with a standard app screencast.

characters.appearance: Female, 20s, slim build, medium complexion. Dark hair tied back neatly. Symmetrical facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue blazer over a light blue collared shirt.

characters.appearance: Male, 20s, medium build, medium complexion. Short, dark, curly hair and a light mustache/beard.
Female, 20s, slim build, medium complexion. Long, dark, wavy hair.
characters.wardrobe: White top with subtle purple patterns, a small necklace, and earrings.
characters.demeanor: Curious, slightly skeptical initially, then impressed.

scenes.setting: Top: blurred office. Bottom: plain grey wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is centered in the frame, looking directly at the camera with a pleasant smile. She maintains a relatively still posture. The background is a softly blurred, bright office environment with glass partitions, suggesting a professional setting. The lighting is even and bright, highlighting her features clearly.

Character B is centered in the frame, looking directly at the camera. His mouth moves as he speaks, and his expression is focused. The background is a plain, flat grey wall with no distinguishing features. The lighting is soft and frontal, casting minimal shadows.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout shows an AI tutor on top and a human learner on the bottom. The top panel features a professional office background, while the bottom panel has a plain grey background. Text overlays appear in the center of each panel, displaying the spoken dialogue in Tamil and English.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: இந்த coffee ரொம்ப சூடா இருக்கு. [This coffee is very hot.]
Character A says: This coffee is very hot.
Character B says: The coffee is very hot.
Character A says: எனக்கு இந்த coffee taste ரொம்ப பிடிச்சிருக்கு. [I like the taste of this coffee.]
Character A says: I like the taste of this coffee.
Character B says: I like the taste of this coffee.
scenes.on_screen_text:
இந்த coffee ரொம்ப சூடா இருக்கு. (This coffee is very hot.)
This coffee is very hot.
எனக்கு இந்த coffee taste ரொம்ப பிடிச்சிருக்கு. (I like the taste of this coffee.)
I like the taste of this coffee.

scenes.setting: Top: doorway. Bottom: plain grey wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character C stands in a doorway, holding the handle of a light-colored wooden door. She looks slightly downward, as if addressing someone seated below her eye level. Her expression shifts dynamically from curious to surprised and then pleased as she listens. The background consists of a plain beige wall and the edge of the door.

Character B remains in the same position against the plain grey wall. He looks slightly upward and to his left, engaging in a conversation with someone off-camera. He uses subtle head movements and facial expressions to emphasize his points, appearing confident and animated.

scenes.visual_description: The split-screen layout continues, now showing a female friend on top and the male learner on the bottom. The top panel shows a doorway setting, while the bottom remains a plain grey wall. The characters appear to be having a conversation across the split screen. Text overlays appear in the center of the panels, displaying the spoken dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character C says: Hey, நீ English எங்க கத்துக்குற? [Hey, where are you learning English?]
Character B says: SpeakX app-ல AI teacher கிட்ட கத்துக்கிட்டு இருக்கேன். [I am learning from an AI teacher on the SpeakX app.]
Character C says: என்னது? புரியலையே? [What? I don't understand?]
Character B says: இது ஒரு app. இதுல நீங்க daily AI English teacher கூட practice பண்ண முடியும். [This is an app. In this, you can practice daily with an AI English teacher.]
Character B says: இப்ப இருக்க காலத்துல English தெரியலைன்னா job கிடைக்காது. [In today's times, if you don't know English, you won't get a job.]
Character B says: ஏன்? Respect கூட கிடைக்காது. கரெக்டா? [Why? You won't even get respect. Right?]
Character B says: அதனாலதான் daily just 10 to 15 minutes SpeakX app-ல இருக்க AI teacher கூட practice பண்றேன். [That's why I practice daily for just 10 to 15 minutes with the AI teacher on the SpeakX app.]
Character B says: Just 10 days தான் ஆச்சு. இப்ப என் English ரொம்பவே improve ஆயிருச்சு. [It's only been 10 days. Now my English has improved a lot.]
Character B says: இப்போ நான் பயமில்லாம confident-ஆ English பேசுறேன். [Now I speak English confidently without fear.]
Character B says: அதுவும் ரொம்ப affordable. [And it's very affordable too.]
Character C says: நானும் English கத்துக்கணும்னு ஆசை. ஆனா இந்த மாதிரி courses-லாம் costly-ஆ இருக்குமே? [I also want to learn English. But aren't courses like this costly?]
Character B says: இல்ல, 7 days free trial இருக்கு. [No, there is a 7 days free trial.]
Character C says: Oh super! நான் இப்பவே SpeakX app-ஐ download பண்றேன். [Oh super! I will download the SpeakX app right now.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
Hey, நீ English எங்க கத்துக்குற? (Hey, where are you learning English?)
SpeakX app-ல AI teacher கிட்ட கத்துக்கிட்டு இருக்கேன். (I am learning from an AI teacher on the SpeakX app.)
என்னது? புரியலையே? (What? I don't understand?)
இது ஒரு app. இதுல நீங்க daily AI English teacher கூட practice பண்ண முடியும். (This is an app. In this, you can practice daily with an AI English teacher.)
இப்ப இருக்க காலத்துல English தெரியலைன்னா job கிடைக்காது. (In today's times, if you don't know English, you won't get a job.)
ஏன்? Respect கூட கிடைக்காது. கரெக்டா? (Why? You won't even get respect. Right?)
அதனாலதான் daily just 10 to 15 minutes SpeakX app-ல இருக்க AI teacher கூட practice பண்றேன். (That's why I practice daily for just 10 to 15 minutes with the AI teacher on the SpeakX app.)
Just 10 days தான் ஆச்சு. இப்ப என் English ரொம்பவே improve ஆயிருச்சு. (It's only been 10 days. Now my English has improved a lot.)
இப்போ நான் பயமில்லாம confident-ஆ English பேசுறேன். (Now I speak English confidently without fear.)
அதுவும் ரொம்ப affordable. (And it's very affordable too.)
நானும் English கத்துக்கணும்னு ஆசை. ஆனா இந்த மாதிரி courses-லாம் costly-ஆ இருக்குமே? (I also want to learn English. But aren't courses like this costly?)
இல்ல, 7 days free trial இருக்கு. (No, there is a 7 days free trial.)
Oh super! நான் இப்பவே SpeakX app-ஐ download பண்றேன். (Oh super! I will download the SpeakX app right now.)

panels.panel_visual_description: A modern smartphone is displayed vertically in the center of the frame. The phone has a thin black bezel and a visible front-facing camera cutout at the top. It is set against a solid, seamless light orange or yellow background. The screen of the phone is visible, displaying an interface.

scenes.visual_description: A smartphone is shown against a solid yellow background. The phone screen displays the SpeakX app interface, featuring the AI tutor avatar and a 'Download Now' button. The overall composition serves as a final call to action.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: உடனே SpeakX app download பண்ணி AI teacher-ஓட English கத்துக்கோங்க. [Download the SpeakX app immediately and learn English with an AI teacher.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
SpeakX POWERED BY AI
LESSON 8: Daily English
Speak with AI
